name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Haltom City, TX's Cash America Pawn at 4530 NE 28th St offers quick cash loans on personal items, jewelry, and electronics.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn operates at 4530 NE 28th St in Haltom City, TX, serving the northeast Haltom City area with convenient pawn and lending services. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, this standalone location is easily accessible throughout the week for your urgent cash needs.

At this Haltom City location, you can pawn jewelry, electronics, tools, sporting equipment, and other valuable items for immediate cash. The team evaluates your items quickly and offers competitive loan amounts based on current market value. Call +1 817-834-0301 to ask about specific items or current loan rates.

If you need cash fast in Haltom City, bring a valid government ID and your items to the 4530 NE 28th St location—loans can be approved the same day. This is ideal for short-term financial gaps or selling items you no longer need, with no credit checks required.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans — no credit check, no collections, no credit score impact
Over 2,500 store locations across the U.S. and Latin America for easy access
Buys a wide range of items on the spot: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Layaway plan available with 10% down — no interest financing for purchases
Publicly traded parent company (FirstCash, S&P MidCap 400) with regulatory oversight and standardized practices
Lease-to-own and retail finance options via AFF subsidiary at 15,000+ merchant locations
cons: Pawn loan amounts are based on resale value, typically a fraction of an item's retail or sentimental worth
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans are typically high on an annualized basis — varies by state law
Items not redeemed within the loan term are forfeited and sold — no partial credit or extensions guaranteed
No online loan process — requires in-person visit with physical collateral
Retail merchandise is secondhand and inventory varies unpredictably by location
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash and own jewelry, electronics, or tools but have poor or no credit
People seeking a short-term, no-credit-check loan without risk of collections or credit reporting
Bargain shoppers looking for secondhand electronics, jewelry, or sporting goods at below-retail prices
Individuals who want to sell gold, silver, or platinum quickly without going through a jeweler
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn is best for consumers who need immediate cash and have physical assets to pledge but cannot qualify for or do not want traditional credit products. The non-recourse structure means no collections risk, but loan values are low relative to item worth and fees are significant — it is a last-resort bridge, not a cost-effective borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (non-recourse, collateral-based, no credit check)
Outright purchase of personal property for immediate cash
Retail sale of secondhand jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway plan (10% down on retail purchases)
Store locator for 2,500+ U.S. and Latin American locations
Lease-to-own payment solutions via AFF subsidiary
Retail finance point-of-sale solutions via AFF at 15,000+ merchant partners
meta_description: Haltom City, TX: Cash America Pawn at 4530 NE 28th St. Quick pawn loans on jewelry and electronics.
